# freeipa_dns_record (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA DNS Records.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the DNS record.
- `record_type` (String) DNS record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, SRV, TXT, PTR, NS, SSHFP.
- `record_value` (String) DNS record value.
- `zone_name` (String) The DNS zone name.

### Optional

- `ttl` (Number) Time to live.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Format: zone_name:name:record_type:record_value.
